mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT t.id,t.name,t.name_en, s.name AS school_name, uc.first_name AS coach_first_name, uc.last_name AS coach_last_name, t.season, up.first_name AS prize_coach_first_name, up.last_name AS prize_coach_last_name, up.first_name_en AS prize_coach_first_name_en, up.last_name_en AS prize_coach_last_name_en, t.is_female_team FROM team t LEFT JOIN school s ON s.id = t.school_id LEFT JOIN user uc On uc.id = t.coach_id LEFT JOIN user up On up.id = t.prize_coach_id WHERE t.id = #{teamId}
SELECT DISTINCT u.id,u.first_name,u.last_name,u.first_name_en,u.last_name_en FROM team_member tm LEFT JOIN team t ON tm.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user u ON tm.member_id = u.id WHERE t.id = #{teamId}

WITH ranked_members AS( SELECT *,ROW_NUMBER() over (PARTITION BY team_id order by id) AS rn FROM team_member ), member1 AS ( SELECT * from ranked_members where rn = 1), member2 AS ( SELECT * from ranked_members where rn = 2), member3 AS ( SELECT * from ranked_members where rn = 3) SELECT DISTINCT t.id, COALESCE(t.name, '') as Name, COALESCE(t.name_en, '') as NameEn, COALESCE(s.name, '') as schoolName, COALESCE(CASE WHEN t.is_female_team = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END, '') as isFemaleTeam, COALESCE(su.occupation_quota_type,'') as occupationQuotaType, CONCAT(COALESCE(uc.first_name, ''), COALESCE(uc.last_name, '')) as coachName, CONCAT(COALESCE(uc.first_name_en, ''), COALESCE(uc.last_name_en, '')) as coachNameEn, COALESCE(uc.phone, '') as coachPhone, CONCAT(COALESCE(up.first_name, ''), COALESCE(up.last_name, '')) as prizeCoachName, CONCAT(COALESCE(up.first_name_en, ''), COALESCE(up.last_name_en, '')) as prizeCoachNameEn, COALESCE(up.phone, '') as prizeCoachPhone, CONCAT(COALESCE(u1.first_name, ''), COALESCE(u1.last_name, '')) as MemberName1, CONCAT(COALESCE(u1.first_name_en, ''), COALESCE(u1.last_name_en, '')) as MemberNameEn1, COALESCE(u1.phone, '') as MemberName1Phone, CONCAT(COALESCE(u2.first_name, ''), COALESCE(u2.last_name, '')) as MemberName2, CONCAT(COALESCE(u2.first_name_en, ''), COALESCE(u2.last_name_en, '')) as MemberNameEn2, COALESCE(u2.phone, '') as MemberName2Phone, CONCAT(COALESCE(u3.first_name, ''), COALESCE(u3.last_name, '')) as MemberName3, CONCAT(COALESCE(u3.first_name_en, ''), COALESCE(u3.last_name_en, '')) as MemberNameEn3, COALESCE(u3.phone, '') as MemberName3Phone FROM signup su INNER JOIN team t ON su.team_id = t.id INNER JOIN school s ON su.school_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user uc ON t.coach_id = uc.id LEFT JOIN user up ON t.prize_coach_id = up.id LEFT JOIN member1 tm1 ON t.id = tm1.team_id LEFT JOIN user u1 ON tm1.member_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN member2 tm2 ON t.id = tm2.team_id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON tm2.member_id = u2.id LEFT JOIN member3 tm3 ON t.id = tm3.team_id LEFT JOIN user u3 ON tm3.member_id = u3.id WHERE su.competition_id = #{competitionId}
